category_sources: Official site describes Fairy-Stockfish as a chess variant engine derived from Stockfish.
source_facts.description says Fairy-Stockfish is a strong open source chess variant engine.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is `fairy-stockfish`; official website and repository use `Fairy-Stockfish`.
docs_sources: Official README points users to the project wiki for more information.
Official website provides documentation sections for variants, GUIs, NNUE, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official website and README list supported protocols including UCI and CECP/XBoard.
source_facts.description identifies a chess variant engine.
